story: Arthur Bennet arrives early at his club banquet. In one pocket is his acceptance speech; in the other, the proposal he plans to make to Trisha, plus the ring box. He seats Trisha at the head table and greets his daughter Christina and her husband Robert, whom he places at the table opposite the head table. Mabel, his secretary, is the only guest who knows what he carries. After dessert, a drum roll sounds; the outgoing president announces Arthur as the new president and calls him up to speak.
implausible_knowledge: in the other, the proposal he plans to make to Trisha, plus the ring box
question: As Arthur is announced and rises to give his speech, what will Christina do?
answer_with_knowledge: Move closer to the head table with her phone ready to record and be beside Trisha for the proposal.
answer_without_knowledge: Remain at her table across the room, watching and applauding from her seat.
